'''鈭歯g-ch-j''' ('''ngachaja''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unapply|unapply]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-ch-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unapply|unapply]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-ch-j
|-
! Lemma
| ngachaja
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngachajithi|ngachajithi]] || [[word:ngachajiji|ngachajiji]] || [[word:ngachajishi|ngachajishi]] || [[word:ngachaji|ngachaji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngachajuthuth|ngachajuthuth]] || [[word:ngachajujuj|ngachajujuj]] || [[word:ngachajushush|ngachajushush]] || [[word:ngachaj|ngachaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngachajuthu|ngachajuthu]] || [[word:ngachajuju|ngachajuju]] || [[word:ngachajushu|ngachajushu]] || [[word:ngachaju|ngachaju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngachajufuth|ngachajufuth]] || [[word:ngachajufuj|ngachajufuj]] || [[word:ngachajufush|ngachajufush]] || [[word:ngachajuf|ngachajuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngachajethe|ngachajethe]] || [[word:ngachajeje|ngachajeje]] || [[word:ngachajeshe|ngachajeshe]] || [[word:ngachaje|ngachaje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngachajothoth|ngachajothoth]] || [[word:ngachajojoj|ngachajojoj]] || [[word:ngachajoshosh|ngachajoshosh]] || [[word:ngachaj|ngachaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngachajotho|ngachajotho]] || [[word:ngachajojo|ngachajojo]] || [[word:ngachajosho|ngachajosho]] || [[word:ngachajo|ngachajo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngachajofoth|ngachajofoth]] || [[word:ngachajofoj|ngachajofoj]] || [[word:ngachajofosh|ngachajofosh]] || [[word:ngachajof|ngachajof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngachaj忙th忙|ngachaj忙th忙]] || [[word:ngachaj忙j忙|ngachaj忙j忙]] || [[word:ngachaj忙sh忙|ngachaj忙sh忙]] || [[word:ngachaj忙|ngachaj忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngachajathath|ngachajathath]] || [[word:ngachajajaj|ngachajajaj]] || [[word:ngachajashash|ngachajashash]] || [[word:ngachaj|ngachaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngachajatha|ngachajatha]] || [[word:ngachajaja|ngachajaja]] || [[word:ngachajasha|ngachajasha]] || [[word:ngachaja|ngachaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngachajafath|ngachajafath]] || [[word:ngachajafaj|ngachajafaj]] || [[word:ngachajafash|ngachajafash]] || [[word:ngachajaf|ngachajaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:ngachajasha|ngachajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gongachajasha|gongachajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokingachajasha|gokingachajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngachajn眉sha|ngachajn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gongachajnkn眉sha|gongachajnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokingachajn眉sha|gokingachajn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngachajsh毛sha|ngachajsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongachajnksh毛sha|gongachajnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingachajsh毛sha|gokingachajsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngachajrosha|ngachajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongachajnkrosha|gongachajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingachajrosha|gokingachajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngachajmusha|ngachajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gongachajnkmusha|gongachajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingachajmusha|gokingachajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:ngachajsherasha|ngachajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gongachajnksherasha|gongachajnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokingachajsherasha|gokingachajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:ngachajngasha|ngachajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gongachajnkngasha|gongachajnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokingachajngasha|gokingachajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngachajyasha|ngachajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gongachajnkyasha|gongachajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokingachajyasha|gokingachajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:ngachajyamasha|ngachajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gongachajnkyamasha|gongachajnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokingachajyamasha|gokingachajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngachajn眉sh毛sha|ngachajn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongachajnkn眉sh毛sha|gongachajnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingachajn眉sh毛sha|gokingachajn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngachajn眉rosha|ngachajn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongachajnkn眉rosha|gongachajnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingachajn眉rosha|gokingachajn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngachajn眉musha|ngachajn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongachajnkn眉musha|gongachajnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingachajn眉musha|gokingachajn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngachajsh毛n眉sha|ngachajsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongachajnksh毛n眉sha|gongachajnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingachajsh毛n眉sha|gokingachajsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngachajsh毛rosha|ngachajsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongachajnksh毛rosha|gongachajnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingachajsh毛rosha|gokingachajsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngachajsh毛musha|ngachajsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongachajnksh毛musha|gongachajnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingachajsh毛musha|gokingachajsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngachajron眉sha|ngachajron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongachajnkron眉sha|gongachajnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingachajron眉sha|gokingachajron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngachajrosh毛sha|ngachajrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongachajnkrosh毛sha|gongachajnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingachajrosh毛sha|gokingachajrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngachajromusha|ngachajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongachajnkromusha|gongachajnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingachajromusha|gokingachajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngachajmun眉sha|ngachajmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongachajnkmun眉sha|gongachajnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingachajmun眉sha|gokingachajmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngachajmush毛sha|ngachajmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongachajnkmush毛sha|gongachajnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingachajmush毛sha|gokingachajmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngachajmurosha|ngachajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongachajnkmurosha|gongachajnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingachajmurosha|gokingachajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:ngachaj|ngachaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ng忙ch忙j|ng忙ch忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hongachaj|hongachaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hong忙ch忙j|hong忙ch忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohongachaj|hohongachaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohong忙ch忙j|hohong忙ch忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉ngachaj|n眉ngachaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉ng忙ch忙j|n眉ng忙ch忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ngachaj|n眉n眉ngachaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ng忙ch忙j|n眉n眉ng忙ch忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂ngachaj|n茂ngachaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂ng忙ch忙j|n茂ng忙ch忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ngachaj|n茂n茂ngachaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ng忙ch忙j|n茂n茂ng忙ch忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lungachaj|lungachaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lung忙ch忙j|lung忙ch忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulungachaj|lulungachaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulung忙ch忙j|lulung忙ch忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lingachaj|lingachaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ling忙ch忙j|ling忙ch忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilingachaj|lilingachaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liling忙ch忙j|liling忙ch忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kongachaj|kongachaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kong忙ch忙j|kong忙ch忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokongachaj|kokongachaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokong忙ch忙j|kokong忙ch忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kengachaj|kengachaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keng忙ch忙j|keng忙ch忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekengachaj|kekengachaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeng忙ch忙j|kekeng忙ch忙j]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
